---
kind: task_template
name: Weekly Factory Health Review
description: Weekly review of factory-level throughput, queue discipline, runtime reliability, readiness debt, and budget posture
schema: agentcompanies/v1
assignee: chief-of-staff
project: studio-os
recurring: true
---

Review once per week:

- active versus queued WIP
- queue freshness
- blocked and stale work
- failed recurring tasks
- launch and substrate readiness debt
- support burden
- budget burn versus cap

## Required Output

Leave behind:

- one factory health report
- one company-world-model report
- one action list with owners and due dates
